name: zephyr-workbench
description: Zephyr project support for Visual Studio Code

zephyr-workbench.pathToEnvScript.markdownDescription: Set the path to the environment script to configure the Zephyr environment.

zephyr-workbench.venv.activatePath.description: Deprecated: path to the Python virtual environment activation script.

zephyr-workbench.venv.path.description: Path to your Python virtual environment directory (root). Leave empty to use the default internal environment.

zephyr-workbench.listSDKs.description: List of paths which point to Zephyr SDK supported on Zephyr Workbench

zephyr-workbench.listIARs.description:
List of registered IAR ARM Toolchain entries.
Each entry is an object { "zephyrSdkPath": "...", "iarPath": "...", "token": "..." }

zephyr-workbench.listArmGnuToolchains.description:
List of registered Arm GNU Toolchain entries.
Each entry is an object { "toolchainPath": "...", "targetTriple": "arm-none-eabi|aarch64-none-elf", "version": "..." }

zephyr-workbench.westWorkspace.description: The path to the attached west workspace

zephyr-workbench.westWorkspace.applicati.description: Applications declared by this West workspace. Entries use the same Zephyr Workbench application settings shape as freestanding applications, scoped to this workspace.

path.description: Application path relative to the West workspace root.

zephyr-workbench.westWorkspace.selectedA.description: Selected West workspace application path, relative to the West workspace root. Used when a workspace declares more than one application.

zephyr-workbench.sdk.markdownDescription: The path to the Zephyr SDK that provides toolchains. Exposed to the build as `ZEPHYR_SDK_INSTALL_DIR`.

enumDescriptions: Zephyr SDK: GNU/GCC toolchain (alias for 'zephyr/gnu' SDK >= 1.x)
zephyr-workbench.toolchain.markdownDescription: ZEPHYR_TOOLCHAIN_VARIANT to use for this project. The legacy value `zephyr_sdk` is automatically migrated to `zephyr` on first use.

zephyr-workbench.gnuarmemb.markdownDescription:
Selected Arm GNU Toolchain path for this workspace.
It is used in GNUARMEMB_TOOLCHAIN_PATH.
The value must match a registered entry from `zephyr-workbench.listArmGnuToolchains`.

zephyr-workbench.iar.description:
Per-workspace override for which IAR toolchain to use.
Must be one of the objects defined in zephyr-workbench.listIARs.

zephyr-workbench.build.west-args.description: User additional args to west command

zephyr-workbench.sysbuildEnabled.description: When enabled, the --sysbuild flag will be appended to West build commands.

default-runner.description: Preferred west runner for this configuration (used for Run/Flash without prompting)

custom-args.description: Custom arguments passed to the runner (e.g. -p /dev/ttyX, --erase)

west-args.description: User additional args to west command

west-flags.description: Additional CMake -D flags appended to west build after --.

sysbuild.description: When true, the --sysbuild flag will be appended to west build commands.

env.FILE_SUFFIX.description: Optional suffix for filenames that will be added to Kconfig fragments and devicetree overlays

zephyr-workbench-activitybar.name: West workspaces
zephyr-workbench-activitybar.contextualTitle: west workspaces with Zephyr sources and modules

view/item/context.when: (view == zephyr-workbench-west-workspace && viewItem == west-workspace-env) || (view == zephyr-workbench-app-explorer && viewItem == zephyr-application-env) || (view == zephyr-workbench-app-explorer && viewItem == zephyr-application-west-d-flags)

(view == zephyr-workbench-west-workspace && viewItem == west-workspace-env-value) || (view == zephyr-workbench-app-explorer && viewItem == zephyr-application-env-value) || (view == zephyr-workbench-app-explorer && viewItem == zephyr-application-west-d-flag)

(view == zephyr-workbench-west-workspace && viewItem == west-workspace-env-value) || (view == zephyr-workbench-app-explorer && viewItem == zephyr-application-env-value) || (view == zephyr-workbench-app-explorer && viewItem == zephyr-application-west-d-flag)

config.description: The name of the build configuration

cwd.description: Working folder. By default, the root of the workspace folder

env.markdownDescription: Additional environment variables with the format "name" : "value".

scripts.pretest: npm run compile && npm run lint
